date_of_joining: January 2026 (leaves will be provided for examination)

package_salary.ppo_ctc: Stipend during 6 months Internship : INR 21,000 pm + Medical insurance of 2.5 LPA + Refreshments Salary after 6 months Internship (Post confirmation) : CTC 6 – 7 LPA (depending on their performance in the training period)
package_salary.bond: 2 year bond period (applicable from day one). 2 L Penalty / 3 months notice
